Variable Label: Subject Identifier for the Study  Char
Source Variable: Extract the last 8 characters of the Synthea ID string.
Concatenate STUDYID, a hyphen "-", and SUBJID.
Keep as YYYY-MM-DD (Ensure it is an ISO 8601 character string).

Mapping Rule: Map directly. If missing, leave blank.
If DEATHDATE is not missing, set to "Y".
Uppercase the value. Map "BLACK" to "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN", "NATIVE" to "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE". Keep "WHITE" and "ASIAN" as is.
If upcase is "NONHISPANIC" set to "NOT HISPANIC OR LATINO". If "HISPANIC" set to "HISPANIC OR LATINO".

Source Variable: Since all patients are in Massachusetts, hardcode as "USA".
